meaning: n.专制君主,暴君n.[史] 拜占庭皇帝及其家属的名誉称号(后来其家臣也使用)
examples: Our headmaster is a despot IC person.
A despot whom the wise ridicule and obey.
This despot has been extended to children born old.
But no one is as passionate about baking as Nadir Gullu, the self-proclaimed "dessert despot".
Some speak nostalgically of the days of Siad Barre, the despot toppled in 1991.
